root.name: sample.toml
root.content:
# Sample TOML file for tree-sitter exploration
# pyproject.toml style configuration

[project]
name = "sample-project"
version = "1.0.0"
description = "A sample project for tree-sitter exploration"
readme = "README.md"
license = { text = "MIT" }
requires-python = ">=3.10"
authors = [
    { name = "Developer", email = "dev@example.com" },
    { name = "Another Dev", email = "another@example.com" },
]
maintainers = [
    { name = "Maintainer", email = "maintainer@example.com" },
]
keywords = ["sample", "tree-sitter", "parsing"]
classifiers = [
    "Development Status :: 4 - Beta",
    "Intended Audience :: Developers",
    "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
]

# Dynamic fields
dynamic = ["version"]

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://example.com"
Documentation = "https://docs.example.com"
Repository = "https://github.com/example/sample"
Changelog = "https://github.com/example/sample/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md"

[project.scripts]
sample-cli = "sample.cli:main"
sample-server = "sample.server:run"

[project.gui-scripts]
sample-gui = "sample.gui:launch"

[project.entry-points."sample.plugins"]
builtin = "sample.plugins.builtin:BuiltinPlugin"
external = "sample.plugins.external:ExternalPlugin"

# Dependencies
[project.dependencies]
requests = ">=2.28.0"
pydantic = ">=2.0.0"
click = ">=8.0.0"
rich = ">=13.0.0"

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=7.0.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.0.0",
    "mypy>=1.0.0",
    "ruff>=0.1.0",
]
docs = [
    "sphinx>=6.0.0",
    "sphinx-rtd-theme>=1.0.0",
]
all = [
    "sample-project[dev]",
    "sample-project[docs]",
]

# Build system
[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling>=1.18.0"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.version]
path = "src/sample/__init__.py"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.sdist]
include = [
    "/src",
    "/tests",
]
exclude = [
    "*.pyc",
    "__pycache__",
]

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/sample"]

# Tool configurations
[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py310"
line-length = 88
select = [
    "E",   # pycodestyle errors
    "W",   # pycodestyle warnings
    "F",   # pyflakes
    "I",   # isort
    "B",   # flake8-bugbear
    "C4",  # flake8-comprehensions
    "UP",  # pyupgrade
]
ignore = [
    "E501",  # line too long
    "B008",  # function calls in argument defaults
]

[tool.ruff.per-file-ignores]
"__init__.py" = ["F401"]
"tests/**" = ["S101"]

[tool.ruff.isort]
known-first-party = ["sample"]

[tool.mypy]
python_version = "3.10"
strict = true
warn_return_any = true
warn_unused_configs = true
disallow_untyped_defs = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = "tests.*"
disallow_untyped_defs = false

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
minversion = "7.0"
addopts = "-ra -q --cov=sample --cov-report=term-missing"
testpaths = ["tests"]
pythonpath = ["src"]
filterwarnings = [
    "error",
    "ignore::DeprecationWarning",
]

[tool.coverage.run]
branch = true
source = ["src/sample"]
omit = ["*/tests/*", "*/__init__.py"]

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "def __repr__",
    "raise AssertionError",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
]

# Custom application configuration
[app]
name = "Sample Application"
debug = false
log_level = "info"

[app.server]
host = "0.0.0.0"
port = 8000
workers = 4

[app.database]
url = "postgresql://localhost/sample"
pool_size = 10
echo = false

[[app.database.replicas]]
url = "postgresql://replica1/sample"
weight = 1

[[app.database.replicas]]
url = "postgresql://replica2/sample"
weight = 2

[app.cache]
backend = "redis"
url = "redis://localhost:6379/0"
ttl = 3600

[app.features]
new_dashboard = { enabled = true, rollout = 0.5 }
dark_mode = { enabled = true, default = false }

# Inline tables
[app.metadata]
created = 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z
tags = ["production", "v1"]
stats = { views = 1000, users = 50 }

# Array of tables
[[app.services]]
name = "auth"
url = "https://auth.example.com"
timeout = 30

[[app.services]]
name = "api"
url = "https://api.example.com"
timeout = 60
retries = 3

# Different value types demonstration
[values]
string = "Hello, World!"
multiline = """
This is a
multiline string
with preserved newlines."""
literal = 'C:\Users\example\path'

integer = 42
negative = -17
hex = 0xDEADBEEF
octal = 0o755
binary = 0b11010110

float = 3.14159
scientific = 6.022e23
infinity = inf
nan = nan

boolean_true = true
boolean_false = false

datetime = 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z
date = 2024-01-15
time = 10:30:00

array = [1, 2, 3]
nested_array = [[1, 2], [3, 4]]
mixed_array = ["string", 42, true, 2024-01-15]
